ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 2023-07-15
ham.body:
Dear Alex,

Thank you for booking with SmartFlights. Here are your flight details:

• Airline: Air India
• Flight No: AI 123
• Date: 15 July 2023
• Departure: New Delhi (DEL) 10:30 AM
• Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) 12:20 PM
• Seat: 12C (Aisle)
• Gate: 22

Check-in opens 24 hours before departure. You can check in online by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Boarding time is 5:45 AM. Please arrive at the airport 2 hours before departure.

If you have any questions or need to make changes to your booking, reply to this email or call our support line 1800-123-456.

Thank you for choosing SmartFlights. Safe travels!

Best regards,
SmartFlights Team
